steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given equation.
$$v=-\frac{w}{180x}$$
Since $x$ is nonzero, multiply both sides by $180x$.
$$180xv=-w$$

steps.title: Switch the sign
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $-1$ to isolate $w$. $$w=-180xv$$ This is the same as $w=-180vx$. The answer is A.
